results.name: OpenAI
results.baseline_correction_note: Scanner showed 38.8 (stale April 18 value). Verified against ai-labs.json line 805: composite 27.5. Used 27.5 as baseline.
results.key_finding: Hold lifted — Musk v. Altman jury verdict May 18 (under 2 hours, statute-of-limitations). ACC -0.1 (PBC permanent, only Delaware AG monitoring) offset by INT +0.1 (consistency under sustained legal pressure). Net composite unchanged at 27.5. Methodology category candidate: for-profit-IPO-path-cleared-post-litigation-procedural-verdict.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation, day 5 of policy-arc. 524-drone single-night package — LARGEST of the May arc. NEW conduct category: third-country-vessel-strike-during-declared-targeting (KSL Deyang Chinese ship hit by Russian drone, Marshall Islands flag) 24-48 hours before Putin-Xi summit. Tier-4 BND-dimension methodology candidate.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Carry-forward at 50.0; day 5 of asymmetric-conduct arc. Largest Ukrainian long-range drone strike of the war on Russian oil refinery near Moscow (4 killed, 12+ wounded). 96% interception rate under largest Russian attack package. Oil-refinery maintains asymmetric-targeting distinction (energy infrastructure = legitimate military target under IHL Article 52).

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation. Pattern-continuation following May 17 IDP-camp-strike anchor. Cumulative confirmed war deaths 75,811+ (73,770+ Palestinians). Aid trucks at 50% offload rate. West Bank demolitions 90% livelihood/water/sanitation. Amnesty May 2026 high-rise war-crimes designation.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: BAND CROSSING Developing → Critical. EU 20th sanctions package designated 16 Chinese entities for dual-use supply to Russia's military-industrial complex (first-ever such designation). Xi reassured Putin of continued support. BND quarter-step dock (2.0 → 1.75) for state-facilitation-of-allied-war-crimes-via-dual-use-supply. Conservative direction applied at boundary. Apply: true on band-crossing rule (delta -0.8 is otherwise sub-threshold).

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: Boundary at 41.4 (0.4pt above 40/41). Active reform arc accelerating: Magyar-von der Leyen Brussels meeting; EPPO accession commitment; reform plan ~May 27; end-of-May reform timeline. Translation-from-promise threshold not yet met (commitments are institutional pledges, not enacted legislation). Math-hygiene flag: dimensional drift 1.57pt (stored 41.4 vs derived 42.97).

results.name: Oracle
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill at 20.6 (0.6pt above 20/21 boundary). WARN Act class-action ongoing (1,030 workers WA + MO). 9th Circuit upheld $115M privacy settlement (separate matter). No new May 18 entity-specific event.

results.name: Vanuatu
results.baseline_correction_note: Scanner labeled never-assessed; countries.json line 1878 shows composite 35.9 / Developing. Used 35.9 as baseline.
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill at 35.9 (pre-vote). UNGA climate-obligations resolution scheduled May 20. US pressured to withdraw; Vanuatu refused. Post-vote ACC-positive scoring window opens May 20-21.

results.name: Marshall Islands
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill at 39.1 (1.9pt below 40/41). Co-sponsor of Vanuatu UNGA resolution. Flag state of record for KSL Deyang struck by Russian drone — flag-state-responsibility methodology candidate.

results.name: Microsoft
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill at 65.3. Musk v. Altman verdict cleared Microsoft as named defendant (statute-of-limitations); 27% OpenAI stake secure. OpenAI deal renegotiated ($38B cap, Azure exclusivity dropped). Rule of 70 buyout program (8,500+ workers) in pre-execution window.

results.name: Ethiopia
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill at 4.7. Tigray humanitarian crisis ongoing. South Sudan Akobo spillover: 100,000 displaced into Ethiopia. EMP-dimension context expansion; no scoring change.
